title: Rich Velvety Venezuelan Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty, comforting Venezuelan stew featuring a rich and velvety texture, achieved with the use of unflavored gelatin. This vegetarian-friendly dish is perfect for a monsoon day.
instructions: In a small bowl, dissolve the gelatin in 1/4 cup of hot water and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots, potatoes, and zucchini, and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the tomato paste, cumin, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the dissolved gelatin and continue to simmer for an additional 10 minutes, or until the stew has thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
